description: Key-value store service contract v1 — 7 operations for eventual-consistency key/value stores. Targets Cloudflare Workers KV, Deno KV, Upstash Redis-as-KV. Small values (typically <=25MB), optional TTL on writes, eventual global propagation. Not suitable for strongly-consistent or transactional workloads.

operations.description: Retrieve the value for a single key
operations.name: key_get

operations.description: Write a value for a single key with optional TTL and metadata
operations.name: key_put

operations.description: Delete a single key (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: key_delete

operations.description: List KV namespaces accessible to the credentials
operations.name: namespace_list

operations.description: List keys in a namespace with optional prefix filter
operations.name: key_list

operations.description: Write many key-value pairs in a single operation
operations.name: bulk_put

operations.description: Delete many keys in a single operation (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: bulk_delete

title: kv-v1
